---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a change to the backend stub or ML inference service
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature description

What would you like to add or change?

## Motivation

Why is this needed? Who benefits?

## API contract impact

- [ ] **No** — internal / deploy / docs only
- [ ] **Yes** — changes request/response shapes for `/api/v1/*` or `/predict`

If yes, note coordination with the main repo [Changing the API](https://github.com/HelloblueAI/Bleu.js/blob/main/docs/CHANGING_THE_API.md) runbook.

## Proposed solution

How should it work?

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues
- [ ] I confirmed this belongs in **Bleujs.-backend** (not the SDK repo)
